runtime_boundary.root_cause_fixed: The loaded WASM package predated ListResourcesResponse.applied_environment_bundle_filter and dropped the control-plane acknowledgement in the browser transport.
runtime_boundary.verification: After rebuilding WASM, clearing .next, restarting Next, and reloading the page, a direct registered WASM service byte round trip returned { purpose: 2, workerType: do-agent }; the rendered form retained the Definition document requirement.

responsive_state_boundary.root_cause_fixed: ResponsiveShell swaps desktop and mobile shell component trees, which unmounted the ResourceEditor local reducer.
responsive_state_boundary.verification: The WorkerTemplate draft is held in a Dashboard session keyed by organization. Browser verification selected DoAgent on desktop, changed to the mobile layout, and retained settings / json / DO_AGENT_SETTINGS.

not_claimed.template_plan_or_apply: Not attempted: required model, compute target, resource allocation, and EnvironmentBundle references are absent in the development organization.
not_claimed.worker_lifecycle: Not attempted: migration repair, verified cloud base-image references, and disposable lifecycle credentials remain external gates.
